commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the dependency guard script and focused tests so SHA-bound override comments can be accepted from repository admins as well as existing security approvers, with matching guard messages.

PR surface: Tests +25, Other +24. Total +49 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main has no repository-admin permission check in the dependency override path, and the configured explicit approver list is active in the workflow.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is secops/codeowner policy approval and live workflow confidence, not a safe autonomous repair.

target.title: fix: allow admins to approve dependency guard
target.body:
## Summary

- Allow repository admins to authorize dependency graph changes with the same SHA-bound `/allow-dependencies-change` command used by secops.
- Update dependency guard comments and failure text so the accepted approver set is explicit.
- Keep the existing freshness barrier and exact-head-SHA binding for dependency approvals.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/dependency-guard-script.test.ts test/scripts/dependency-guard-workflow.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --parallel-tests "node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/dependency-guard-script.test.ts test/scripts/dependency-guard-workflow.test.ts"`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Repository admins can approve intentional dependency graph changes through the existing dependency guard override command without needing secops team membership.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on macOS with the repo Vitest wrapper and autoreview helper.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/dependency-guard-script.test.ts test/scripts/dependency-guard-workflow.test.ts`; `git diff --check`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --parallel-tests "node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/dependency-guard-script.test.ts test/scripts/dependency-guard-workflow.test.ts"`.
Evidence after fix: Focused dependency guard script and workflow tests passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings and confirmed the admin path remains constrained by the SHA-bound override and freshness barrier.
Observed result after fix: The override parser accepts a repository-admin approver when the current guard comment binds the approval to the current head SHA, while stale or non-approver comments remain rejected.
What was not tested: A live GitHub Actions run against an actual PR with an admin override comment.
